en: Whatever you choose to do with it you'll be great Our family doesn't run from things
ko: 뭘 선택하든 넌 잘할 거야. 우리 가족은 도망치지 않아.

en: You're the best of all of us Miles You're on your way Keep going
ko: 넌 우리 중 최고야, 마일스. 잘 가고 있어. 계속 가.

en: When do I know I'm Spider Man You won't
ko: 언제 내가 스파이더맨인 걸 알 수 있어요? 모를 거야.

en: That's all it is Miles A leap of faith
♪ ♪ Like what's up danger ♪ Made them myself
♪ Can't stop me now ♪ ♪ Travel 200 miles I'm knocking at your door ♪ ♪ And I don't really care if you ain't
there by my door ♪ ♪ What's up danger
